# Accessor: hardblank

## Get Signature

```ts
get hardblank(): string;
```

Hardblank character declared by the font.

### Returns

`string`

### Example

<TextmodeApiSandbox profile="textmode.figlet.js" language="javascript" title="hardblank" encoded-code="-" />
